subcodes.first_line: O ye servants of the Abha Beauty! It is related that in ages past, there lived a learned man who possessed the attribute of truthfulness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندگان جمال ابهی روایت کنند که شخص نحریری در اعصار ماضیه که بصفت صدیقی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @stories; anecdotes, @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
